description: Welcome to Citadel Point, a gated community of duplex-style homes with stunning Colony Farm views. This functional floor plan offers 3 large bedrooms up and a full bath, including a massive primary bedroom with ensuite. Enjoy engineered hardwood throughout and a chef’s kitchen with quartz countertops and stainless steel appliances, opening to a spacious deck perfect for year-round BBQs. The family room features vaulted ceilings and abundant natural light. The lower level includes a full bathroom, large rec room, generous 4th bedroom, large storage room, and walk-out to a private patio and yard. A true 10/10, close to schools, transit, and quick access to Hwy 1.
